prompts:
/plan "create a master development plan for the backend, read the analysis at 'apps/backend/APP_ANALYSIS.md' and the following issues and file then create the one plan to rule them all (master plan for the backend) that will run a bunch of other plans based on the analysis :   Key Issues to Address

  1. Convex integration incomplete - All database operations use optional chaining and will fail
  2. Stripe integration stubbed - Checkout sessions and webhooks not implemented
  3. No auth guards - Controllers marked @ApiBearerAuth but guards not applied
  4. Using browser Convex client - Should use Node SDK for backend
  5. No README - Missing setup/deployment documentation

  Files of Interest

  - src/main.ts:6 - Application bootstrap with CORS/security setup
  - src/app.module.ts:21 - Root module (only AdminModule currently imported)
  - src/modules/auth/auth.service.ts:66 - Token validation and usage limit enforcement
  - src/modules/subscriptions/subscriptions.service.ts:91 - Subscription tier logic
  - src/modules/listings/listings.service.ts:95 - Core listing business logic
  - src/config/configuration.ts - All environment variables documented

  Analysis saved to: apps/backend/APP_ANALYSIS.md"
